# Filter by server type

Choose between rack, blade or all servers.

Add any extra filtering options following logical AND rule. Use -o|--output for desired output format.

## Blade Servers

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_servers_type.blade:iserver.output.default
```

## Rack Servers

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_servers_type.rack:iserver.output.default
```

Developer output

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_servers_type.rack:devel.debug
```
